headline: Docker & Apple Silicon Tips
caption:
If you're developing on an M1 or M2 Mac, you might run into common frustrations with Docker containers not running as expected. Make sure to specify the correct platform during image pulls or builds using --platform=linux/amd64 or linux/arm64. Also, choose container images that support Apple Silicon natively or are multi-architecture. This small setup tweak can save you hours of troubleshooting and ensure smooth development workflows. Happy containerizing! 🚀 

#DockerTips #AppleSilicon #DevLife #FullStackEngineer #ContainerHacks
